title: Fostering financial & economic growth and inclusion since 2015
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Founded in 2015, SMTAX has...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - Founded in 2015, SMTAX has been at the forefront of delivering expert Tax, Accounting, Finance, and Advisory services across South Africa. Our mission is to foster the Financial & Economic Empowerment of all Africans by improving financial inclusion, education and providing essential support to unlock growth opportunities.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - Founded in 2015, SMTAX has been at the forefront of delivering expert Tax, Accounting, Finance, and Advisory services across South Africa. Our mission is to foster the Financial & Economic Empowerment of all Africans by improving financial inclusion, education and providing essential support to unlock growth opportunities."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Our vision is to see a financially empowered Africa where individuals and businesses thrive."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We leverage cutting-edge technology to achieve our mission, while our core values - Excellence, Partnership, and Growth through Shared Value - guide everything we do.","html":"We leverage cutting-edge technology to achieve our mission, while our core values - Excellence, Partnership, and Growth through Shared Value - guide everything we do."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We proudly expanded our reach by opening a new branch in Knysna, strategically located at TH15.1 Long Street, Thesen Harbour Town, Thesen Island to serve the Garden Route community.","html":"We proudly expanded our reach by opening a new branch in Knysna, strategically located at TH15.1 Long Street, Thesen Harbour Town, Thesen Island to serve the Garden Route community."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This new branch is dedicated to providing personalised financial solutions, with a particular focus on Business Support Solutions and Funding Support (namely, Purchase Order/Contract Financing).","html":"This new branch is dedicated to providing personalised financial solutions, with a particular focus on Business Support Solutions and Funding Support (namely, Purchase Order/Contract Financing)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"At SMTAX, we believe in the power of collaboration. Our partnerships with industry leaders like Standard Bank, ABSA, Old Mutual, and many more ensure we bring our clients comprehensive and trusted financial services.","html":"At SMTAX, we believe in the power of collaboration. Our partnerships with industry leaders like Standard Bank, ABSA, Old Mutual, and many more ensure we bring our clients comprehensive and trusted financial services."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
